member.name: T:WinterRose.Reflection.AnonymousMember
member.summary: represents a runtime variable on

member.name: T:WinterRose.Reflection.InvalidMethodReturnTypeException
member.summary: Thrown when a method has an invalid return type based on the context it is being used in

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.InvalidMethodReturnTypeException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Thrown when a method has an invalid return type based on the context it is being used in

member.name: T:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData
member.summary: Represents a field or property under a unified API

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.Name
member.summary: The identifier of the field or property.

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.MemberType
member.summary: The kind of member this is.

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.Type
member.summary: The type of the field or property.

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.Attributes
member.summary: The custom attributes on the field or property.

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.FieldAttributes
member.summary: Field attributes, if this is a field. Otherwise, throws an .

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.PropertyAttributes
member.summary: Property attributes, if this is a property. Otherwise, throws an .

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.IsPublic
member.summary: Indicates if the field or property is public.

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.PropertyHasSetter
member.summary: Indicates if the property has a setter.

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.IsStatic
member.summary: Indicates if the field or property is static.

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.IsInitOnly
member.summary: Indicates if the field is readonly. eg const or readonly

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.IsLiteral
member.summary: Indicates if the field is a literal. eg const or static readonly

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.CanWrite
member.summary: Indicates if the field or property can be written to.

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.ByRef
member.summary: Whether or not the type is a reference type

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.IsValid
member.summary: Whether or not there actually is a field or property to read/write to.

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.DeclaringType
member.summary: The type that declares the member

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.GetValue``1(``0)
member.summary: Gets the value stored at this field or property
member.returns: The object stored in the field or property

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.GetValue``1(``0@)
member.summary: Gets the value stored at this field or property
member.returns: The object stored in the field or property

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.GetValueRef``2(``0@)
member.summary: Returns a by-ref reference to a field on the provided target object. Only fields are supported (not properties). Uses DynamicMethod + IL generation.
member.typeparam: Type of the target object (owner of the field).
Type of the field to return by ref.
member.param: Target instance (passed by ref for value-type owners).

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.GetValue
member.summary: For a static value.

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.SetValue``2(``0@,``1)
member.summary: Writes the value to the field or property. If the field or property is readonly, an is thrown.

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.SetValue``2(``0,``1)
member.summary: Writes the value to the field or property. If the field or property is readonly, an is thrown.

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.HasAttribute``1
member.summary: Gets whether the field or property has the provided attribute
member.returns: True if the field or property has at least 1 attribute of the given type

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.GetAttribute``1
member.summary: Gets the attribute of the specified type
member.returns: The first found attribute of type . if there is no such attribute, null is returned

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.MemberData.GetAttribute(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the attribute of the specified type
member.returns: The first found attribute of type. if there is no such attribute, null is returned

member.name: T:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper
member.summary: Provides helper functions

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.ForObject(System.Object@)
member.summary: Creates a reflection helper for the given object

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.ForObject(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a reflection helper for the given object

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.ForType(System.Type)
member.summary: Creates a new ReflectionHelper for type only. instance operations are not available

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.IncludePrivateFields
member.summary:
Explicitly set that private fields should be included
Default is

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.ObjectType
member.summary: The type of the object this ReflectionHelper operates on

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.#ctor(System.Object@)
member.summary: Creates a reflection helper for the given object

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.#ctor(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a reflection helper for the given object

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Creates a new ReflectionHelper for type only. instance operations are not available

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.GetMember(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a member, whether that is a field, a property, or a runtime variable from

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.GetMembers
member.summary: Gets all members, meaning fields, properties, and runtime variables from in one unified data structure

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.GetFields
member.summary: Gets all fields

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.GetProperties
member.summary: Gets all properties

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.GetField(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a field

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.GetProperty(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a property

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.TryGetMember(System.Dynamic.GetMemberBinder,System.Object@)
member.summary: From allows for getting of members through the dynamic keyword on the object/type this reflection helper represents rather than the reflectionhelper itself

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.TrySetMember(System.Dynamic.SetMemberBinder,System.Object)
member.summary: From allows for setting of members through the dynamic keyword on the object/type this reflection helper represents rather than the reflectionhelper itself

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.GetFieldOrProperty(System.String,System.Reflection.FieldInfo@,System.Reflection.PropertyInfo@)
member.summary: Gets a field or a property with the given name
member.returns: 0 if a field was found, 1 if a property was found, and -1 if neither was found

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.GetValueFrom(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the value at the field or property of the given name

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.GetFieldValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the value of the field of the given name

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.SetValue(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Sets the value at the field or property of the given name

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.GetTypeOf(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the type of the field or property of the given name

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.InvokeMethod``1(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Invokes a method with the given name and arguments. Returns the value of the method

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionHelper.InvokeMethod(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Invokes a method with the given name and arguments, does not return the value

member.name: T:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionUtil
member.summary: util extension methods

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.ReflectionUtil.IsAnonymousType(System.Type)
member.summary: Whether or not the type is anonymous. whether compile time anoymous, any kind of or generated one alike

member.name: T:WinterRose.Reflection.StructReference
member.summary: Wrapper to hold a direct reference to a struct, and allows it to be stored like a class

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.StructReference.#ctor(System.Void*)
member.summary:
Wrapper to hold a direct reference to a struct, and allows it to be stored like a class
Use with absolute care.

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.StructReference.Get
member.summary: Gets the referenced value

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.StructReference.As``1
member.summary: Gets the referenced value as

member.summary: The type of

member.summary: The type of

member.name: T:WinterRose.Reflection.ITypeConverter
member.summary: Base interface for

member.name: T:WinterRose.Reflection.TypeConverter
member.summary: Central registry that maps one Type to another

member.name: T:WinterRose.Reflection.TypeConverter`2
member.summary: Generic base class, inherit from this and implement . Instances auto-register at start-up, so no boilerplate registration code.

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.TypeConverter`2.SourceType
member.summary: the type of

member.name: P:WinterRose.Reflection.TypeConverter`2.TargetType
member.summary: The type of

member.name: M:WinterRose.Reflection.TypeConverter`2.Convert(`0)
member.summary: When overriden in a derived class, converts to

member.name: T:WinterRose.Reflection.TypeNotFoundException
member.summary: Gets thrown when a type is not found when using the serializer

member.name: T:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.Anonymous
member.summary:
This is a base class for any type generated using / and thus can be used to store these objects as class fields even
Can also be used on its own to store runtime variables in a dictionary-like manner.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.Anonymous.#ctor
member.summary:
This is a base class for any type generated using / and thus can be used to store these objects as class fields even
Can also be used on its own to store runtime variables in a dictionary-like manner.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.Anonymous.Item(System.String)
member.summary:
Accesses the anonymous object to get or set the field of the given name.
throws an exception if the identifier doesnt exist
member.remarks:
The implementation is generated when the anonymous type
is compiled using /
This does not use any reflection or use of the dynamic keyword and is therefor really fast

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.Anonymous.Get``1(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the value using and tries to cast it to

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.Anonymous.Set``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Sets the value using

member.name: T:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousAttribute
member.summary: The type was generated using

member.name: T:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousMethod
member.summary: A struct that represents a method in a class that was parsed through the .

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousMethod.Name
member.summary: The name of the method.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousMethod.Parameters
member.summary: The parameters of the method.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousMethod.#ctor(System.String,System.Object,System.Reflection.MethodInfo,System.Type[])
member.summary: Creates a new instance of .

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousMethod.Invoke(System.Object[])
member.summary: Invokes the method.
member.returns: The value the method returned. value is always null if the method returns

member.name: T:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeBuilder
member.summary: A class that can create anonymous types.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeBuilder.CreateNewAnonymousType(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Creates a new anonymous type from the specified properties.
member.param: When not null, the generated type has this type as a base. thereby the accessing of members using 'this[string]' is not possible. However this can be quite useful when creating things like mods or other kinds of extensible features.

member.name: T:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeBuilderHelper
member.summary: A class that creates the underlying type for an anonymous type.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeBuilderHelper.CreateTypeBuilder(System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Creates a new type builder.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeBuilderHelper.CreateProperty(System.Reflection.Emit.TypeBuilder,System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Creates a new property for the specified type buidler.

member.name: T:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader
member.summary: A class that can read and write anonymous objects.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.TypeName
member.summary: The name of the class that is created from this reader when is called.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.BaseType
member.summary:
The base type of the generated type when is caled.
if , its

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.GetDynamicMemberNames
member.summary: Gets the dynamic member names.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new empty anonymous object reader.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.#ctor(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a new anonymous object reader from the specified object.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.TryGetMember(System.Dynamic.GetMemberBinder,System.Object@)
member.summary: Tries to get the member.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.Add(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a new property to the object.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets or sets a property value.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets or sets a property value by index.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.Count
member.summary: The number of properties in the object.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Gets the enumerator of all properties.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.Read(System.Object)
member.summary: Reads an anonymous object. Overrides the current object.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.Compile(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String)
member.summary: Creates an anonymous object from the specified properties.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousTypeReader.Compile
member.summary: Compiles this anonymous object into a new IL type

member.name: T:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue
member.summary: A struct that represents a value in an object. This is mainly used to represent values in an anonymous object. but through the AnonymousObjectReader it can be used to represent any class or struct its fields or properties.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.Name
member.summary: The name of the field or property

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.Value
member.summary: The value of the field or property

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.ValueType
member.summary: The type of the value of the field or property. Null if the value is null.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.BoolValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.ByteValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.SByteValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.ShortValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.UShortValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.IntValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.UIntValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.LongValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.ULongValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.FloatValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.DoubleValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.DecimalValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.CharValue
member.summary: The value of the field or property as a

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.StringValue
member.summary:
The value of the field or property as a
If the value is not a string, it will call on the value.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.AnonymousObjectReaderValue
member.summary:
The value if it is a
Allows for accessing deeper values in the object.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.MethodValue
member.summary:
The value if it is a (method)
This method may return a value, and have parameters. This is unknown by the IDE at write time.

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.HasValue
member.summary: Whether the value is null or not.

member.name: M:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.#ctor(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of

member.name: P:WinterRose.AnonymousTypes.AnonymousValue.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Allows for accessing the value if it is a and the value is not null.

member.name: T:WinterRose.TypeWorker
member.summary: Provides methods for finding a type or method within accessable assembiles, and easy casting to and from default data types

member.name: P:WinterRose.TypeWorker.SupportedPrimitives
member.summary: All the types supported by the cast methods provided by

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.GetBaseTypesWIP(System.Type)
member.summary: WIP method

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.FindImplicitConversionMethod(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: searches for the method that implicitly converts the source type to the target type. Works with generic type conversions.

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.Convert(System.Object,System.Type)
member.summary: the same as Convert.ChangeType(object frrom, object To) except this returns a dynamic instead of an object
member.returns: a dynamic object converted to the given type. or null if converting failed

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.FindNestedType(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Recursively searches for a nested type within the given type and its nested types. Supports nested class notation like "Outer+Inner" and generic nested classes.

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.GetAllTypesIncludingNested(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Recursively collects all types from an assembly, including nested types.

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.CollectNestedTypesRecursive(System.Type,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Type})
member.summary: Recursively collects nested types from a parent type.

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.FindNestedTypeRecursive(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Recursively searches for a nested type within the given type and its nested types. Supports nested class notation like "Outer+Inner" and generic nested classes.

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.FindTypesWithAttribute``1
member.summary: Finds all types that have the given attribute, including nested types.
member.returns: An array of types that have the given attribute. if no type has the given attribute it returns an empty array

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.FindMethod(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Searches for a method within the given type that has the given name.
member.returns: returns the found method info if a method with the given name is found, otherwise returns null

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.CastPrimitive(System.Object,System.Type,System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String)
member.summary: Casts the given file to the given destination type. should this fail it throws an exception

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.CastPrimitive``1(System.Object,``0,System.Reflection.Assembly,System.String)
member.summary: Casts the given file to the given destination type. should this fail it throws an exception

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.CastPrimitive``1(System.Object)
member.summary: Casts the given file to the given destination type. should this fail it throws an exception

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.TryCastPrimitive``1(System.Object,``0@)
member.summary: Attemts to cast a primitive value to the given cast target
member.returns: true if the operation was successful, otherwise false. puts the result in . if the operation failed this will be the default value of the specified target type

member.name: M:WinterRose.TypeWorker.TryCastPrimitive(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object@)
member.summary: Attemts to cast a primitive value to the given cast target
member.returns: true if the operation was successful, otherwise false. puts the result in . if the operation failed null is returned

member.name: T:WinterRose.FailedToCastTypeException
member.summary: Gets thrown when casting fails

member.name: T:WinterRose.CastTypeNotSupportedException
member.summary: Gets thrown when destination type is not supported by the methods

member.name: T:WinterRose.MethodNotFoundException
member.summary: Gets thrown when a linked method for events when serializing is not found
